Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=700}

Run.Text: Continue watching your missiles until they impact with the American convoy. If for any reason this first salvo doesn't sink every ship, make sure to launch another four missiles from the K-175.

If even this fails to sink all the American ships, our last option is to close to very short range and use the SS-N-22 missiles aboard Osmotritelny to sink the convoy. However, this is quite unlikely to be required as a salvo of 12 x SS-N-3 should be enough to sink the (relatively unprotected) convoy.

For more difficult scenarios, where NATO convoys are protected by Aegis cruisers and many more escorts, you can see how coordinating a perfect ToT attack with many platforms contributing is absolutely necessary!
